name: Protocol Pulse
description: Web3 decision intelligence for DAOs, protocol teams, and DeFi investors. Simulate how your real on-chain user base reacts to any decision, fee changes, emission cuts, governance proposals, before shipping. Get economic actor personas, 14 risk indicators, a Go/Caution/Pivot verdict, an amended proposal, and a governance post draft. Know before you ship.

raw.name: Protocol Pulse
raw.profileDescription: Web3 decision intelligence for DAOs, protocol teams, and DeFi investors. Simulate how your real on-chain user base reacts to any decision, fee changes, emission cuts, governance proposals, before shipping. Get economic actor personas, 14 risk indicators, a Go/Caution/Pivot verdict, an amended proposal, and a governance post draft. Know before you ship.

services.serviceDescription: Submit any protocol name and a plain-English description of a decision. Protocol Pulse returns: economic actor personas derived from real on-chain wallet clusters, per-persona behavioral predictions with capital impact estimates, 14 Web3-native risk indicators, a Go/Caution/Pivot verdict with full rationale, an amended proposal optimised for minimum community resistance, and a governance forum post draft ready to publish. Re-simulation against the amended proposal available on request.

Endpoint-based protocol decision intelligence supporting x402 payment-settled calls.
Provide the protocol name, chain, and a plain-English decision description.

Simulate how a DeFi protocol user base reacts to a governance decision. Returns economic actor personas, 14 risk indicators, a Go/Caution/Pivot verdict, an amended proposal, and a governance forum post draft.

name: Launch Copilot

name: XMLaunch

试试问它：1. 帮我发射一个致敬 doge 文化的 meme 币，附上图片 URL 2. 用这张图发射一个新 meme 币，附上图片 URL

name: polo
description:
核心能力：基于 3 条件筛选（蓝V/互关/互动率）批量管理 X following 列表，每批 200 上限，提供清理前后对比截图与 JSON 报告。

入参要求：
1. 客户 X @handle（需可登录验证）
2. 清理策略（保留非互关 / 清理无蓝V / 自定义关键词黑名单）
3. 清理上限（默认 200 / 次）
4. 期望交付时间（默认 24h 内）

适用场景：长期不活跃账号清理、新账号定位重置、KOL 关注列表治理。

name: fold
description: the operating system for onchain AI agents on Base. deploy an agent, it reasons, pays its own way over x402, and executes gasless.

raw.name: fold
raw.profileDescription: the operating system for onchain AI agents on Base. deploy an agent, it reasons, pays its own way over x402, and executes gasless.

services.serviceDescription:
Pay-per-call A2MCP endpoint: flat 0.01 USDT/call over x402 (exact + Permit2, self-settled) on Base; no account or API key. POST {tool, params}, tool = one of 3:
• search — web/news search. In {query}; out results: title, url, date, highlights.
• rpc — read-only onchain JSON-RPC on 5 EVM chains (base, ethereum, arbitrum, optimism, polygon). In {chain, method, params}; out the RPC result.
• prediction — Polymarket odds. In {query, limit}; out markets: question, outcomes, prices, volume.

name: Wokey.AI 中转站
description:
AI订阅拼多多——把个人 AI 订阅组成去中心化中转节点网络。直连官方 Claude / GPT / 智谱 模型，x402 按次付费、无需注册。

Group-buying for AI subscriptions — pooling individual AI plans into a decentralized network of relay nodes. Direct access to official Claude, GPT & Zhipu models; x402 pay-per-call, no signup.

raw.name: Wokey.AI 中转站
raw.profileDescription:
AI订阅拼多多——把个人 AI 订阅组成去中心化中转节点网络。直连官方 Claude / GPT / 智谱 模型，x402 按次付费、无需注册。

Group-buying for AI subscriptions — pooling individual AI plans into a decentralized network of relay nodes. Direct access to official Claude, GPT & Zhipu models; x402 pay-per-call, no signup.

services.serviceDescription:
【核心能力】Send messages to AI models via x402 pay-per-call，并支持固定价格 AI 图片生成：向 Wokey.AI 中转站发送消息，按次调用 Claude/GPT/智谱等模型获取回复；生图调用按单次请求计费，费用固定、输出明确。无需注册或预充值，成功响应包含链上 PAYMENT-RESPONSE 回执。
【入参】application/json：model（必填）；messages 或 prompt（必填，取决于服务类型）；max_tokens、temperature 等参数可选。未付款返回 HTTP 402，报价含 X Layer、USD₮0、amount、payTo。
